---
format: 
    html:
        fontsize: x-large
---

Welcome to the `carecodeconnect` home page рЯ§Ч

*"Building persuasive technologies with AI and Machine Learning for health, well-being & sustainability"*

![](images/carecodeconnect.jpeg)

To learn about us, explore our:

- [About](about.qmd): who we are and what we do

- [Blog](blog.qmd): revisioning data science for the age of AI

- [Projects](projects.qmd): building solutions to complex social problems

- [Testimonials](testimonials.qmd): what our collaborators say about us

This home page was made with вЭ§пЄП using [Python](https://www.python.org/), [Quarto](https://quarto.org/), and deployed with [GitHub Actions](https://docs.github.com/en/actions).
